label: Part 01
text: There was once a farmer and his wife. She had been married before, her first husband had died, and now she was married again. They lived on a remote farm in the west of England, and what a pair of fools they were! Which of them was the most foolish? Listen to the story and decide for yourself.

sentences.en: There was once a farmer and his wife.
sentences.pt: Era uma vez um fazendeiro e sua esposa.
sentences.ptbr: dér uóz uâns a fármer end riz uáif

sentences.pt: o primeiro marido dela tinha morrido,

sentences.en: and now she was married again.
sentences.pt: e agora ela era casada novamente.
sentences.ptbr: end náu chi uóz mérrid aguén

sentences.en: They lived on a remote farm in the west of England,
sentences.pt: Eles moravam em uma remota fazenda no oeste da Inglaterra,
sentences.ptbr: dêi livd ón a rimôut fárm in de uést ov ínglend

sentences.en: and what a pair of fools they were!
sentences.pt: e que par de tolos eles eram!
sentences.ptbr: end uót a pér ov fúls dêi uér

sentences.en: Which of them was the most foolish?
sentences.pt: Qual deles era o mais tolo?
sentences.ptbr: uîtch ov dem uóz de môust fúlish

sentences.en: Listen to the story and decide for yourself.
sentences.pt: Escute a história e decida você mesmo.
sentences.ptbr: líssen tu de stóri end dissáid fór iursélf
